data.title: 国际服网页活动「Problem Solver 68 and the Miracle of the Offering Box」
data.summary: [Web Event Notice] 'Problem Solver 68 and the Miracle of the Offering Box' Event begins! Log in toda
data.body:
[Web Event Notice]

'Problem Solver 68 and the Miracle of the Offering Box' Event begins!
Log in today to make a wish at the Offering Box & check out the special Episode!

🗓️Schedule: 9/26 (Tue) 1:00 PM – 10/17 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)

#BlueArchive![KmNUkSr54YX36j2WXBUnoV2japxuwWJ7.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/KmNUkSr54YX36j2WXBUnoV2japxuwWJ7.jpg)
